title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates Capital India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates Capital India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Prestige Estates Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Property Consultant to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Prestige Estates Capital India:
Prestige Estates Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
